cards.front: What type of architecture is the Transformer based on?
cards.back: It relies entirely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions.

cards.front: What is the primary input/output processing mechanism in the Transformer model architecture?
cards.back: It uses stacked self-attention and point-wise, fully connected layers for both encoder and decoder.

cards.front: How are Encoder and Decoder stacks structured in the Transformer?
cards.back: They are composed of identical blocks, typically using N=6 stacked layers.
